hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,glob,subprocess; scripts=glob.glob(os.path.join(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR',os.path.expanduser('~/.claude')),'plugins/cache/*/smart-model-router/*/hooks/session-init.sh')); subprocess.run(['bash',scripts[0]]) if scripts else None"

python3 -c "import os,glob,subprocess; scripts=glob.glob(os.path.join(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR',os.path.expanduser('~/.claude')),'plugins/cache/*/smart-model-router/*/hooks/classify.sh')); subprocess.run(['bash',scripts[0]]) if scripts else None"

python3 -c "import os,glob,subprocess; scripts=glob.glob(os.path.join(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR',os.path.expanduser('~/.claude')),'plugins/cache/*/smart-model-router/*/hooks/track_agent.py')); subprocess.run(['python3',scripts[0]]) if scripts else None"
